title: The U.S. Comes in From the Cold with New Climate-Focused Arctic Strategy
summary: The new climate-focused Arctic Strategy puts the U.S. on the path to fulfill its promise as an Arctic nation. The post The U.S. Comes in From the Cold with New Climate-Focused Arctic Strategy appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
